text.message: Oj if you get all 4 2/1 ports that would be hilarious
Didn’t expect red to take brick ore wheat setup
but red has 11 5 4 locked in, easy 5 10 and safe 3:1 port
was afraid you take 5-4-11 then I would be lost I think
Kinda confused why blue didn’t take that but I suppose I know nothing haha
And blue trading you 2:1 while you have double his points 🤣
sorry guys my spot was not that good
